title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Adversarial-Input Lab
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an amortized-cost ledger and implementation with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
